label: 噪声填充
description: 噪声阈值/数量两模式填充。mode=density（默认）基于坐标哈希噪声场，对有效格在 noise(r,c,seed) > (1-density) 时保留为 1，得到带纹理、空间相关的连片掩码；mode=count 改为精确格数：按 noise 值降序取前 count 个有效格（fillNoiseCount）。同坐标同 seed 结果固定。可用于成片植被/矿藏的精确或按密度散布。
description-en: Noise fill in density or count mode. mode=density (default) keeps each valid cell as 1 when noise(r,c,seed) > (1-density) from a coordinate-hash noise field, yielding a textured spatially-correlated mask; mode=count fills an exact number: take the top count valid cells by noise value descending (fillNoiseCount). Same coordinate + seed is deterministic. Usable for patchy vegetation/ore, exact or density-based.
icon: 深色背景上一片区域内呈连片纹理状分布的点，明暗成块，体现噪声场，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；只在非零有效格内取噪声值。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; the noise field is sampled only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: density
inputs.label: 保留比例
inputs.description: 保留为 1 的目标比例（阈值 = 1 - density），0..1。1=全保留，0=全空。
inputs.description-en: Target fraction of cells kept as 1 (threshold = 1 - density), 0..1. 1 = keep all, 0 = empty.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: 填充模式
inputs.description: density=按阈值二值化（默认，向后兼容）；count=按噪声值降序取精确格数。
inputs.description-en: density = threshold binarization (default, backward compatible); count = exact-count by noise value descending.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 目标格数
inputs.description: count 模式：精确保留的格数（超过有效格数则取全部）。
inputs.description-en: count mode: exact number of cells kept (clamped to valid cells).

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 噪声种子
inputs.description: 噪声场种子，0 使用当前时间。相同坐标 + 相同 seed 结果固定。
inputs.description-en: Noise field seed; 0 uses current timestamp. Same coordinate + same seed is deterministic.

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 填充网格
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的 0/1 点掩码，保留格=1，其余=0。
outputs.description-en: A 0/1 point mask matching the input shape; kept cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 保留格数
outputs.description: 实际保留为 1 的格数。
outputs.description-en: Number of cells actually kept as 1.
